data.content: Shipped approved help color polish by merging origin/work/foolery-76ec-impl as 57d25cee3c97 onto origin/main. Local quality gates passed in a clean shipment worktree after bun install --frozen-lockfile: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Remote CI run 23001883129 passed on commit 57d25cee3c97; Coverage Badge run 23001883137 also passed. Separate Changesets run 23001883154 failed because the repository does not contain a .changeset directory, which appears to be a workflow/configuration issue rather than a regression from this shipment.
